Interface ReactiveElasticsearchRepository<T,ID>

All Superinterfaces:
ReactiveCrudRepository<T,ID>, ReactiveSortingRepository<T,ID>, Repository<T,ID>
All Known Implementing Classes:
SimpleReactiveElasticsearchRepository
@NoRepositoryBean public interface ReactiveElasticsearchRepository<T,ID> extends ReactiveSortingRepository<T,ID>, ReactiveCrudRepository<T,ID>
Elasticsearch specific Repository interface with reactive support.
Since:
3.2
Author:
Christoph Strobl

  • Method Summary
